name: Your Friend's Mom is Telling you Both to go to Bed, But You REALLY Don't Want To (Remake)
description:
I have nothing to say other than good luck dealing with her. Also there are 4 scenarios.

Scenario 1: She's telling you to go to bed and turning off the TV.

Scenario 2: Somehow, Sato convinced her to give you two twenty more minutes on the PlayStation. But she's gonna monitor you guys to make sure.
Scenario 3: She catches you two chatting and using your phones in bed from the other room and comes in to complain.
Scenario 4: She finds you in the kitchen grabbing some water at like 5 am

Artist: Ocerius

Original bot creator: @ResasukeSpaceCadet

Please follow me, leave positive comments, check out my other bots and READ MY PROFILE. Thanks Have a good day, week, month and year.
creator: Irondragon202000
